headline: AI EDA Market to Reach USD 15.85 Billion by 2032 with a 24.4% CAGR
summary: The AI Electronic Design Automation (EDA) market is poised for significant growth, expanding from USD 4.27 billion in 2026 to USD 15.85 billion by 2032, with a CAGR of 24.4%. The surge is propelled by the adoption of data-driven design workflows and intelligent automation in semiconductor projects. The consumer electronics sector is set to dominate with the largest market share in 2026, driven by high chip volume demands for devices like smartphones and wearables.
